implementation_summary: Replaced the unconditional `make_request(data=json.dumps(method_arguments))` call in `GithubTool.execute()` with method-aware dispatch: GET/HEAD/DELETE forward `params=method_args or None` (URL query string); POST/PUT/PATCH forward `data=json.dumps(method_args) if method_args else None` (JSON body). This fixes the root cause of the 422 on /search/issues — the `q=` parameter was previously sent in the request body, which GitHub silently ignores on GET.
